overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the desert outskirts of Night City. The camera approaches an intersection at Sequoia street, stops at a red light while pedestrians cross, then proceeds through the intersection turning right onto a multi-lane highway flanked by red rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road passing under elevated highway

events.description: vehicle slows and comes to a complete stop at red traffic light at Sequoia intersection

agents.ego_description: driving under overpass and approaching intersection, coming to a stop at the red light

entered.detail: large concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the road
tall commercial billboards with neon and digital displays
curved highway ramp structure rising in the distance
red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Sequoia' mounted on traffic gantry
horizontal metal structure supporting traffic signals above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives under a massive concrete overpass on a multi-lane urban road, approaching the Sequoia street intersection. Commercial billboards line the left side while an elevated highway ramp rises ahead. The camera slows and stops at a red traffic light positioned under the gantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: group of pedestrians begins crossing the street from left to right in front of the stopped vehicle
traffic light changes from red to green, signaling vehicle to proceed

agents.ego_description: waiting at the red light while observing pedestrians crossing the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians crossing the street from left to right
silver sedan waiting at the intersection to the left

entered.detail: glass and metal shelter structure with bench and advertising display
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle remains stationary at the Sequoia intersection during the red light. Pedestrians cross the marked crosswalk in front of the vehicle while other cars wait nearby. The traffic signal changes to green after the pedestrians clear, allowing traffic to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial highway with industrial buildings

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stop and proceeds through the intersection
vehicle executes a right turn onto the main arterial road

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and turning right onto the multi-lane highway

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection alongside the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial structure with exposed framework and signage
unfinished building with cranes and scaffolding visible against the hillside
large red rock formations and desert hills rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the green light at Sequoia, navigating through the intersection alongside other traffic. After executing a right turn, the scene opens to a wider multi-lane road with industrial buildings on the right and distant desert cliffs becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway flanked by red rock formations

events.description: approaching next intersection with Manzanita street sign becoming visible

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the highway with desert terrain on the left and commercial buildings on the right

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Manzanita' suspended over the road
steep red rock hillside and desert scrub vegetation lining the left side of the road
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving along the straight multi-lane highway, with prominent red desert cliffs now dominating the left side of the frame. The road stretches ahead toward the Manzanita intersection, with elevated highway structures visible in the distance and palm trees lining the right sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a concrete urban corridor that culminates in a momentary pause at a busy city intersection. It begins with the vehicle driving under a massive concrete overpass on a multi-lane road, passing commercial billboards and an elevated highway ramp. As the vehicle approaches the Sequoia street intersection, the camera slows and comes to a complete stop under a gantry at a red traffic light. The scene then lingers on the stationary vehicle as pedestrians cross the marked crosswalk and nearby cars wait in idling traffic. Finally, the traffic signal shifts to green, allowing the vehicle to proceed forward as the pedestrians clear the intersection.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a busy urban intersection into a wide, arid desert highway. It begins as the vehicle accelerates through a green light at Sequoia, navigating the intersection alongside other traffic before executing a right turn. As the turn completes, the scene opens onto a multi-lane road where industrial buildings on the right give way to the first glimpses of distant desert cliffs. The camera then continues along the straight highway as prominent red rock formations begin to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the view expands toward the Manzanita intersection, passing palm trees on the right and elevated highway structures in the distance.
